Class TestFile

java.lang.Object
java.io.File
io.github.sentinel.files.TestFile
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<File>
Direct Known Subclasses:
CsvFile, ZipFile
public abstract class TestFile extends File

    Creates a TestFile from the DownloadManager's latest download and immediately checks that it exists.

  • Constructor Details

    • TestFile

      protected TestFile() throws FileNotFoundException
      Creates a TestFile from the DownloadManager's latest download and immediately checks that it exists. If it doesn't, an exception is thrown.
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException - in the case that a file is not found at the path given by the DownloadManager, or if a file has not been downloaded in this test session.

    • TestFile

      protected TestFile(Path pathToFile) throws FileNotFoundException
      Creates a TestFile and immediately checks that it exists. If it doesn't, an exception is thrown.
      Parameters:
      pathToFile - Path the path to the file to test.
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException - in the case that a file is not found at the given path.

  • Method Details

    • getAllText

      public String getAllText() throws IOException
      Returns all text from the file in a single String. Uses UTF-8 encoding.
      Returns:
      String all file contents
      Throws:
      IOException - in the case that the file does not exist or cannot be read, or another generic IO error.
